description: Using the dataset ~/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxiety.csv, create a nominal variable named 'Passed' where a score of 50 or higher on the Exam is 1 and lower is 0. Perform a hierarchical binomial logistic regression predicting 'Passed' using 'Revise' in the first block and adding 'Anxiety' in the second block. Save the project to ~/Documents/Jamovi/ExamPass_LogReg.omv. Record the AIC of the final model on the first line and the Odds Ratio for 'Anxiety' on the second line of ~/Documents/Jamovi/model_results.txt.
